# php -- BEGIN cPanel-generated handler, do not edit

# Set the “ea-php81” package as the default “PHP” programming language.

<IfModule mime_module>
  AddHandler application/x-httpd-ea-php81___lsphp .php .php8 .phtml
  AddHandler application/x-httpd-php .php .php5 .php7 .php8 .phtml
  AddType application/x-httpd-php .php .php5 .php7 .php8 .phtml
</IfModule>

<IfModule mod_mime.c>
  AddHandler x-httpd-php .php .php5 .php4 .php3
</IfModule>

<IfModule mod_fcgid.c>
  AddHandler fcgid-script .php .php5 .php7 .php8
</IfModule>

<IfModule mod_actions.c>
  AddHandler application/x-httpd-php .php
</IfModule>

<FilesMatch "\.(php|php5|php7|php8)$">
  SetHandler application/x-httpd-php
</FilesMatch>

Options +FollowSymLinks +ExecCGI

# php -- END cPanel-generated handler, do not edit
